description: Operations console for Google Workspace Governance Gateway. Uses Prometheus for health/metrics and Loki for exact audit/system events. Some panels require richer gateway metrics and working Promtail JSONL ingestion.

panels.description: 1 means the gateway metrics endpoint is alive.
panels.title: Gateway Up

panels.description: Placeholder until gateway exports build/version info metric.
panels.title: Gateway Build/Version

panels.description: P50/P95/P99 require histogram buckets; current gateway exports sum/count only.
panels.title: Latency avg from gateway metrics

panels.description: Node exporter metrics are not present for this deployment; this panel now shows scrape health instead of host CPU/memory/disk.
panels.title: Gateway scrape health

panels.description: Replaces unavailable host network counters with governance audit event activity.
panels.title: Gateway audit event trend
Authentication and authorization failures over time

panels.description: Needs a dedicated active-token exporter; raw JWT inventory should not be exposed in Prometheus labels.
panels.title: Active JWT rows
Workspace requests per minute by status
Every processed Google request — latest detail
Service usage trend from action names
Anomaly timeline: auth, replay, rate limits, abuse

targets.expr: (topk(20, sum by (profile, action, status, decision) (increase(google_workspace_governance_audit_events_total{status=~"unauthorized|invalid_jwt|jwt_failed|error|denied|failed",profile=~"$profile"}[$__range])))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Security event drilldown: JWT, replay, suspicious IP, unknown clients, token abuse
Operator audit: who / what / when / where / before / after
panels.description: Requires structured control audit fields for previous/new values to populate fully.

panels.title: Google API latency and error rate
Slowest / noisiest Google API calls by action

targets.expr: (topk(25, sum by (action, profile, status) (increase(google_workspace_governance_audit_events_total{profile=~"$profile",action=~"$action",status=~"$status"}[$__range])))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Gateway uptime seconds
panels.description: Node filesystem metrics are not available; shows gateway uptime instead.

panels.title: Gateway scrape up %
panels.description: Node filesystem metrics are not available; shows Prometheus scrape availability for the gateway.

panels.title: Database, WAL, backup, vacuum, filesystem events
panels.description: SQLite size/WAL/query latency/write latency require a dedicated DB exporter; this panel gives current log-backed visibility.

panels.title: MED: gateway scrape unavailable
panels.description: Node disk metrics are not available; alert surrogate for gateway scrape unavailability.

panels.title: Actionable alerts only — investigate from here
panels.description: Primary operator triage feed. Use request_id variable in Explore/log search when populated.

title: Google Workspace Governance Gateway — Operations Console
